meta.label: Documents → Page Screenshots
meta.description: Render each page of PDFs/PPTX/DOCX/etc. to images and save to an output managed folder

outputRoles.name: out_images
outputRoles.label: Output images folder
outputRoles.description: Managed folder where page screenshots are written

params.name: start_page
params.label: Start page (1-based, optional)
params.description: Leave 0 or blank to start at first page. Uses offset parameter internally.

params.name: process_mode
params.label: Processing mode
params.description: Choose whether to process only new documents or rescreenshot all documents
